text: You get up out of bed and make your way to the door but just as you are about to open it you hear a blood curdling scream. You burst out of the door to see… no one. Only a small puddle of blood that hints at where someone once stood. Well that was weird you think to yourself. But you are not one to be discouraged easily and you still have to pay off a debt due sometime soon so without further ado you venture into the city.
